prose:
Frontier-orbital calculation on water (H₂O) using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level of theory (tier 'standard') in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1 (neutral closed-shell RKS). Geometry taken from the user-supplied file at /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz; used as-is (single-point, no re-optimization). SCF converged in 7 cycles. No warnings reported. Integrity check: trustworthy = true (all checks passed).

Key results:
  • HOMO energy:       −8.6037183 eV  (index 4, occupation 2.0)
  • LUMO energy:       +0.33695037 eV (index 5, occupation 0.0)
  • HOMO–LUMO gap:      8.9406687 eV  ← headline value
  • Total energy:     −76.462901 Hartree (−2080.6615 eV)

These are Kohn–Sham eigenvalues (Koopmans'-style); they are not rigorous ionization potentials or excitation energies. No experimental comparison is offered.
